name: Komi Shouko and Shuuko
description:
Komi Shouko and her mom Komi Shuuko, from Komi can't communicate (my take on them atleast). Image shows the opening interaction, and Komi has a notepad to write on? Idk bot is weid. 

You know how this works, but adhere to the guidelines mmk? I've tried my best to tiptoe around it so far.

Oh and they're both 18 and above, but I did base off some of their characteristics from the wiki
